comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
## Scope

Extend Tactus MessageHistoryManager to automatically compact history when over budget.

## Implementation

**Modify**: `tactus/core/message_history_manager.py`
- Add constructor params:
  - `compaction_strategy: Optional[CompactionStrategy]`
  - `auto_compact: bool = False`
  - `max_tokens: Optional[int]` (budget threshold)
- Extend `get_history()` method:
  - If `auto_compact` enabled, estimate tokens
  - If over `max_tokens`, call `compaction_strategy.compact()`
  - Store compaction metadata via `_store_compaction_metadata()`
  - Return compacted history transparently
- Add `_estimate_tokens()` helper (4 chars/token heuristic)
- Add `get_compaction_metadata(agent_name)` accessor

## Repository

This work happens in **Tactus** repository at `~/Projects/Tactus`

## Dependencies

- Requires `plx-4bdc03` (CompactionStrategy interface) to be complete

## Testing

Unit tests for:
- Auto-compaction triggers when over budget
- No compaction when under budget
- Compaction metadata storage and retrieval
- Integration with existing filter functions
- Token estimation accuracy

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Completed in Tactus repository as tcts-35cab2. Auto-compaction functionality implemented in MessageHistoryManager with transparent get_history_for_agent() compaction.
